name: github-pr-filter
description: A focused Chromium and Firefox extension for switching GitHub pull-request lifecycle views.

scripts.test:unit: bun run build && bun test test
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:chromium && bun run test:e2e:firefox
scripts.test:e2e:chromium: bun run build && E2E_BROWSER=chromium bun test ./e2e/lifecycle.e2e.js
scripts.test:e2e:firefox: bun run build && E2E_BROWSER=firefox bun test ./e2e/lifecycle.e2e.js
